resources.description: Physical condition. At zero, the character is dying — they will die without intervention within a scene.
Upper bound for hp_current. Rises with permanent advancement.

Long-term ship condition. Accumulates from rough landings, combat hits, deferred maintenance, and contact with alien tech. When ship_wear reaches ship_wear_threshold, a permanent ship problem is inflicted and ship_wear resets to zero.
When ship_wear reaches this value, a new permanent ship problem is rolled.
Lifetime count of permanent ship problems. At 5, the ship is barely flyable. At 10, it is a wreck and cannot leave dock.

Short-term notice from law enforcement, factions, or angry creditors. Rises with loud action and visibility, falls with successful low profile or paid bribes. When heat reaches heat_threshold, a pursuit or hostile encounter follows in hours, not days, and heat resets.
When heat reaches this value, the GM introduces an immediate pursuit or hostile encounter.
